rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quiet Title And Cancel Deeds And Encumbrances To Permit Receivers Sale Per This Courts Prior Orders And To Enforce Settlement Agreement; And To Enjoin Ronald Mazzaferro And Frank Mardeusz From Interfering With The Sale And From Recording Any Document Against The Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 14, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER WILLIAM PARISI's Motion To Quiet Title And Cancel Deeds And Encumbrances To Permit Receivers Sale Per This Courts Prior Orders And To Enforce Settlement Agreement; And To Enjoin Ronald Mazzaferro And Frank Mardeusz From Interfering With The Sale And From Recording Any Document Against The Property Continued to September 28, 2017. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings to department 501 no later than September 19, 2017 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of the moving papers filed on August 7, 2017; Notice of Stay of Proceedings filed on August 31, 2017; Joinder filed by Paul Den Beste on September 12, 2017; and Reply papers filed by Parisi on September 7, 2017. No other courtesy copies have been received. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE D J H DATED JULY 24, 1990 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Objectors For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Objectors' Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied. Objectors failed to show proper grounds on which a motion for judgment on the pleadings may be brought under CCP § 438 in the context of this Petition for Instructions. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, September 13, 2017.
